flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 35% at Woodbury University vs the 2004–2008 baseline (825 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Woodbury University rose 13% between 2007 and 2010 ($25.8k → $29.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Woodbury University rose 12% between 2007 and 2010 ($17.1k → $19.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Woodbury University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
